testcase.name: test_results_include_paper_citations

failure.message: AssertionError: Results papers should have citation_count assert 'citation_count' in {'arxiv_id': '1608.04434v1', 'id': 'f6f0909d-fd4c-42b8-a43a-3fb19564fede', 'link': 'http://arxiv.org/abs/1608.04434v1', 'title': 'Natural Language Processing using Hadoop and KOSHIK'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_citation_keywords_confidence.py:375: in test_results_include_paper_citations assert "citation_count" in paper, "Results papers should have citation_count" E AssertionError: Results papers should have citation_count E assert 'citation_count' in {'arxiv_id': '1608.04434v1', 'id': 'f6f0909d-fd4c-42b8-a43a-3fb19564fede', 'link': 'http://arxiv.org/abs/1608.04434v1', 'title': 'Natural Language Processing using Hadoop and KOSHIK'}
